title: WesterosCTM
description: This mod provides additional 'CTM' types as extensions for the ConnectedTextureMod mod
body:
This mod provides additional 'CTM' types as extensions for the ConnectedTextureMod mod.   Additional types include:


- **westeros_ctm** - port of 'classic[' 47 texture file CTM (versus compact_ctm implemented by ConnectedTextuteMod) - first 47 images in array)

- **westeros_ctm_single** - same as above, but uses single 12 x 4 'template' style CTM image (first image in array) to provide the 47 textures
![47 single ctm](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a146f5f43dda4a642c9f16ce94f5792225f919b2.png)

- **westeros_ctm+pattern** - combination of westeroscrmsingle with 'pattern' - pattern applies to the 'middle' texture (index 26 of the CTM)

- **westeros_h+v** - port of classic 'horizontal+vertical' CTM - uses single image (base image) of 7 x 1 images (see first image below)

- **westeros_v+h** - port of classic 'vertical+horizontal' CTM - uses single image (base image) of 7 x 1 images (see second image below)

![CTM](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/eb57cee6571674660240d996d151006382afbbf7.png)

For examples of all these CTMs, see https://github.com/WesterosCraft/WesterosBlocks/tree/1.18.2/src/main/resources/assets/westerosblocks/textures/block/ctm
